Download a Single File

Source: R/download-file.R
dot-download_single_file.Rd

Downloads a file from a URL to a destination path with progress reporting, automatic retry on transient failures, and resume support for large files.

Usage

.download_single_file(
  url,
  dest_path,
  expected_size = NULL,
  resume = TRUE,
  quiet = FALSE
)

Arguments

url

URL to download from.

dest_path

Destination path for the downloaded file.

expected_size

Expected file size in bytes for resume logic. If NULL, resume is disabled.

resume

Logical. If TRUE (default), attempt to resume partial downloads for files >= 10 MB.

quiet

Logical. If TRUE, suppress progress bar. Default is FALSE.

Value

A list with components:

success

Logical indicating download success

path

Path to the downloaded file

bytes

Size of the downloaded file in bytes
